title: Asking the Right Question
html:
Asking the Right Question

A Yahir thesis that hardens between 2022 and 2026 into the operating principle behind Rankett: the post-LLM stack rewards problem-framers, not technicians. The line itself — "Asking the right question will be the next best skill to have" — appears in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream, weeks after ChatGPT's public launch, embedded in the same junk drawer as voluntary adversity, nonobvious, and the earliest ChatGPT product wedges. It is the cleanest single sentence in the corpus that prefigures the entire AI-search arc.

The lineage runs deep. The same instinct shows up at age 17 in 2020 04 23 go to diamond, where Yahir is quoting Charlie Munger verbatim: "What's within your circle of competence? Is it knowable and is it important?" and "If we knew the answer, it wouldn't be the most important question." Munger's circle-of-competence question and the 2022 next-best-skill restatement are the same instinct repointed — first at investing, then at building. By April 2025, in the Jain biometrics survey screenshot (2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 40 38 pm 56e50e24), Yahir is logging the FMR/FNMR math as a clean instance of "the wrong question makes the answer worthless" — verification accuracy and identification accuracy are not the same thing, and conflating them is how vendors sell broken systems. Same shape: identify the right question first, the answer follows.

The mature form lands in 2026 01 13 rankett com. The whole prompts-are-the-new-keywords thesis underlying Rankett/ai search optimization is asking-the-right-question operationalized as a category. Yahir's product is built on the bet that the next layer of search-engine value goes to whoever helps brands rank against the prompts people actually type into ChatGPT and Claude — i.e., whoever can predict the right questions. The 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide formalizes this: ai visibility engine = surfacing in answers to the queries that matter; share of voice = a measurable score for whose brand is showing up. The whole GTM rests on the premise that asking-the-right-question is now a measurable, billable workflow.

The most personal moment in the arc is the "Are there people out there rn that are truly pursuing this with all of their intention and soul?" line from the same January 2026 note. The principle has folded back on itself: Yahir is asking himself the right question about whether his own conviction is real. The skill is recursive.

Source summaries

  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream
  • 2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 40 38 pm 56e50e24
  • 2026 01 13 rankett com
  • first batch 2026 04 26
